reason: 'purpose' is the dominant everyday meaning of 'syfte'; 'intention' is secondary. Both are near-synonyms here so combine as primary.
Senses list items have embedded articles ('a sight', 'a vision'); strip them as the app articles nouns.
Senses 'niece' and 'the mother's niece' are archaic/dialectal and not relevant for modern learners; drop them.
Single meaning; sub-def just restates the primary. Clear the list.
'såväl' always appears in 'såväl … som' meaning 'both … and / as well as'; the gloss 'as well' is incomplete. The phrase is the best gloss.
Senses list items embed 'to' (verb prefix supplied by app); strip them.
List is padded with near-synonyms of 'safe/secure'; consolidate to two genuinely distinct senses.
Primary is uncountable; 'a security' in senses has embedded article.

'säkert' in everyday speech predominantly means 'probably, surely' (e.g. 'Det kommer säkert att regna' = 'It will probably rain'); 'safely' is the adverb of 'säker' but less frequent as a standalone adverb.
'to transmit' embedded in main translation; app adds 'to'. Fix main and clean senses.
Senses list has 'move downwards' which is a definition of lower, not a distinct sense. Add missing sense 'turn down (volume etc.)'. Drop very marginal golf/basketball sense.
'special (of or related to unconventional warfare)' is a very marginal military jargon sense; drop it.
'in particular' is a synonym of 'particularly', not a distinct sense. Single-meaning word; clear senses.
Sub-def 'a season of a TV series' has embedded article. Fix.
senses: season (of the year or a sport)

reason: Primary 'manner' is less common than 'way'; sub-defs are definitional restatements. 'a set' is very marginal.
senses: way, manner (of behaving or doing something)

reason: 'sätta' primarily means 'put, place, set' — not 'sit'. 'Sätta sig' means sit down, but the bare verb means to put/place. Wrong primary.
'to seek' embedded in main; app adds 'to'.
Senses list items are definition-like; consolidate to clean translations.
Primary has embedded article 'a hold'; senses list has definitional items. Clean up.
Primary 'tact, pace, rhythm' mixes two different meaning clusters. Core everyday meaning is 'beat, rhythm, pace'; 'tact' is also real. Restructure.
Senses include definition-like items. Clean to concise translations.
'to talk' embedded in main; app adds 'to'. Fix senses too.
Sub-def 'given, considering...' is a prepositional phrase sense (med tanke på), not a standalone meaning of 'tanke'. Drop it.
'to seem' embedded in main; app adds 'to'.
Primary 'visible indication' is a definition. Core meaning is 'sign, symbol'.
'teknik' is used equally for 'technique' and 'technology'; neither clearly dominates — use semicolon split.
Senses list is definition-padded. Trim to two clean senses.
Senses list has multiple definition-like restatements of 'theory'. Single meaningful word — clear to empty.
Primary 'number 10' is clumsy; the coin sense is the dominant everyday usage. Main = 'ten-kronor coin' with 'ten' as primary sense.
senses: the number ten, anything numbered ten

reason: Senses items are definition-like restatements of 'early'. Single meaningful word — clear list.
'a wet folden newspaper...' is an extremely marginal craft sense; drop it. 'magazine, journal' is the real second sense.
'to stay silent' embedded in main; app adds 'to'. Fix.
senses: give the silent treatment, deliberately ignore

reason: Sub-def 'e.g.' just restates the primary abbreviation. Single meaning — clear list.
'to permit' embedded in main; app adds 'to'.
'to use, to make use of' embedded in main; app adds 'to'. Single core meaning.
Primary 'thing, an individual object' has definition tail. Trim primary; keep the historical sense.
Senses list item for 'tithe' is definition-like. Trim.
Primary 'tip, as a small amount of information' is definition-like. Fix to bare translation.
Senses items are definition-like. Trim to concise translations.
Senses item 'a girl, a gal' has embedded article. Fix.
Senses list item for job is definition-padded. Trim.
Wiktionary has a very marginal 'skijor' sense that the current list rightly omits; but current sub-defs include 'perform (a song or role)' which is valid. Keep two real senses, drop skijor.
Sub-def just restates primary with minor synonyms. Single meaningful sense — clear list.
'to think' embedded in main; app adds 'to'. Fix senses too.
